docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAKHIMOVSKY, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARKAR, ISSA PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,225.00 FILED BY NAKHIMOVSKY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KARKAR, ISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED JUN-26-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KARKAR, ISSA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL NAKHIMOVSKY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISSA KARKAR IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
